gold: Este sí, la fecha pues fue el 16 de noviembre de 2025. La hora fue pues aproximadamente 11 de la mañana y la sucursal pues es de ustedes en Azcapotzalco.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'Este' (this) and 'Sí,' (yes) are different discourse markers, but both serve as fillers at the start and do not affect the main meaning of the sentence.
The omission of 'sí,' (yes) is a minor discourse marker and does not change the meaning of the sentence.
Difference is only in punctuation (period vs comma), which should be ignored as per guidance.

The insertion of 'en la que está en' instead of just 'en' before 'Azcapotzalco' adds a clarifying phrase ('the one that is in'), but does not change the essential meaning that the branch is in Azcapotzalco.
